title: hieracium gaudryi subsp. hayekianum
intro: Hieracium gaudryi subsp. hayekianum, also known as a species of hawkweed, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Hieracium gaudryi subsp. hayekianum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and it is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
